title: Microsoft SQL Server
text: Microsoft SQL Server The Microsoft SQL Server DBMS connector (MSS) enables you to integrate MS SQL databases with Uniface. Connector Feature Description Mnemonic: MSS Supported Version: For the supported platforms and product versions, see the Platform Availability Matrix . Supported utilities Create Table, Create Script, and Load Definitions, are all supported. SQL support Supported. Stored procedures support Supported. Related Links DBMS Connector Overview This section provides an overview of supported functionality and limitations for all DBMS connectors. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
